prompt: Write a dry one-paragraph Amazon review of the experience of waking up.
response: The daily process of waking up is a notoriously flawed feature that consistently fails to deliver the promised benefits. Upon awakening, one is subjected to an abrupt cessation of unconsciousness, producing a state of disorientation often characterized by incomplete muscle functionality and clouded cognition. The audio cues (namely an alarm) can induce significant stress, triggering an immediate return of responsibilities one was actively avoiding just moments prior. Despite marketing claims, morning grogginess persists regardless of recommended sleep duration, resulting in a low-quality product that achieves no noticeable improvement over time. To make matters worse, the seemingly simple task of procedural transfer from sleep to wakefulness is plagued by unpredictable lag time, with users occasionally returning years later with cursorily improved functionality. This experience is not recommended.
